title: Student Essay Discourse Element Classification
description: Discourse element annotation of student essays based on Song et al. (COLING 2020). Annotators identify argumentative discourse units, classify essay types, and tag rhetorical strategies used in student writing.
citation:
@inproceedings{song-etal-2020-discourse,
    title = "Is this the Era of Persuasion? Identifying Persuasive Techniques in Student Essays",
    author = "Song, Wei and Fu, Ruiji and Liu, Lizhen and Liu, Ting",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 28th International Conference on Computational Linguistics",
    year = "2020",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2020.coling-main.240",
    pages = "2721--2731"
}
